amazon_product_details_section.Manufacturer\n: ‎ Dr. Kurt Wolff GmbH & Co. KG

seller_info_text: Dr. Kurt Wolff GmbH & Co. KG
features: REPAIRS TOOTH ENAMEL: Dr Wolff’s Bioniq toothpaste uses naturally occurring ingredients to repair teeth, we use 20% biomimetic enamel (hydroxyapatite) which works to minimise tooth wear & acts as an enamel repair toothpaste too

FLUORIDE-FREE TOOTHPASTE: The average person consumes plenty of fluoride in their diet, you don’t need it in your tooth paste too, we use the highly effective, active ingredient hydroxyapatite instead
CLEANER WHITER SMILE: Dr Wolff's Bioniq tooth paste keeps your whole mouth fresher & cleaner for longer, the toothpaste whitening properties help brighten your smile too
SMOOTHER SURFACES: As our toothpastes active ingredient works to rebuild and repair your tooth enamel, your teeth are left feeling much smoother, with regular use leading to longer lasting smoothness

SENSITIVE TOOTHPASTE: The Bioniq toothpastes formula is suitable for sensitive teeth, as the enamel-based formula works to repair microscopic defects that led to sensitivity, the toothpaste sensitive teeth need to strengthen
description: Product Description Learn more about Bioniq The + for your gums Repair-Toothpaste Plus combines the effect for the tooth enamel with a double protection for the whole gum Hydroxyapatite During each brushing, Hydroxyapatite remineralises microscopically small defects in the tooth enamel and forms a protective layer. Your partner for healthy teeth The active ingredient in Bioniq Repair Toothpaste helps to repair the enamel surface to keep teeth and gums healthy. Multifunctional ingredient Repair Toothpaste contains 20% biomimetic enamel, also known as Hydroxyapatite – the mineral that naturally makes up approx. 97% of our tooth enamel.
